ques: Find a pre-trained natural language processing model on Hugging Face that can perform sentiment analysis, and make sure the model's last update is within March 2023.
Use the Huggingface Inference API to generate a short story about a dragon and a wizard.
Discover three new and popular open-source NLP models for language translation released in the past month on Huggingface.
Look up a model with a license of cc-by-sa-4.0 with the most likes on Hugging face.
Locate an open-source conversational AI model on Hugging Face, trained in English and list its main features and applications.
Find a model released on Hugging Face for recipe generation. Retrieve the information of the model, including its name, model size and tensor type.
Find the model sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 and use the Inference API on the webpage to get the similarity of the following two sentences: 'Tomorrow is Sunday', 'Eat a burger on Sunday'.
Which is the most downloaded audio related dataset on Hugging face currently.
Retrieve an example of a pre-trained language model in natural language processing and identify the tasks it is specifically designed for, like translation or text summarization.
Find the most download machine translation model on Huggingface which focuses on English and Japanese (en-ja) and report the evaluation metrics stated for it.
Open space: argilla/notux-chat-ui and interact with it by asking it 'which team trained you'. What is its answer.
Identify the latest updated image to video model available on Huggingface and summarize its main features.
Find the most recently updated machine learning model on Huggingface which focuses on Error Correction.
Search for LLaMA in the huggingface doc, what type is the spaces_between_special_tokens parameter in LlamaTokenizer and what is its default value.
How much is the Pro account of Hugging face for a month and what are the features?
Identify the most downloaded models on Hugging face that use the PaddlePaddle library.
Find information on the latest (as of today's date) pre-trained language model on Huggingface suitable for text classification and briefly describe its intended use case and architecture.

Find the most recently updated open-source project related to natural language processing on the Huggingface platform. Provide the project's name, creator, and a brief description of its functionality.
Look up TRL's forward modelling in the hugging face documentation on how to add a margin to a loss.
Explore and summarize the features of the most recent open-source NLP model released by Hugging Face for English text summarization.
Locate a pre-trained natural language processing model on Hugging Face that specializes in named entity recognition (NER), confirm that the model was last updated in 2022 and has 1M+ downloads.
Look up the tour about how to use the 'pipeline' feature in the Hugging Face Transformers library for sentiment analysis, and identify the default model it uses.
Identify the steps to convert a PyTorch model to TensorFlow using the Hugging Face Transformers library as described in their documentation.
Identify three innovative and widely recognized open-source NLP models for automatic speech recognition released in the past month on Huggingface.
Search for a model on Hugging Face with an Apache-2.0 license that has received the highest number of likes.
In the Hugging Face documentation, find the tutorial on loading adapters with PEFT, tell me how to load in 8bit or 4bit.
Identify a model on Hugging Face designed for generating travel chats. Obtain information about the model, including its name, size and training framwork.
Determine the most downloaded dataset related to Text Retrieval in NLP on Hugging Face.
Retrieve an example of a pre-trained model on Hugging Face that is optimized for question answering tasks and detail the languages it supports.
Summarize the description of the recent open-source NLP model released on Hugging Face for medical summarization.
Identify the most downloaded English-Chinese (en-zh) machine translation model on Huggingface and report its latest performance metrics and usage guidelines.
Identify the latest machine learning model on Huggingface that specializes in detecting fake news, including the date of its last update.
On the Hugging Face website, search for the model 'GPT-J-6B' and find the 'temperature' parameter in its settings. What is the default value of this parameter?
List three hugging face docs. How many GitHub stars have they earned so far?
List the benefits of hugging face classroom mentioned on Hugging face website.
Find the latest Diffusion-related blog on Hugging Face, and read its intro or overview section to roughly summarize the content of the blog.
Summarize all the payment plans and their advantages in huggingface pricing.
Browse the daily paper on Hugging Face. What is the title of the first article, how many upvotes has it received, and is there any related model or data release?
Investigate the 'transformers' library in the Hugging Face documentation, focusing on how to add new tokens to a tokenizer.
Investigate in the Hugging Face documentation how to utilize the 'Trainer' API for training a model on a custom dataset, and note the configurable parameters of the Trainer class.
Check out Text Embeddings Inference in Hugging face's Doc to summarise the strengths of the toolkit.
What is the current Text-to-3D model with the highest number of downloads and tell me are there Spaces that use the model.
Check the Dataset Viewer for ai2lumos/lumos_complex_qa_plan_onetime on Hugging face. what is the content corresponding to user in the first message?
Find the most-downloaded model on Hugging Face for the task 'image-classification' and report its author and downloads.
On Hugging Face, browse models filtered to the task 'text-generation' sorted by likes, then name the top three.
Find a model on Hugging Face tagged for 'automatic-speech-recognition' that supports Spanish, and copy the example transformers snippet from its README.
List the top five 'feature-extraction' models on Hugging Face sorted by trending.
Find the most-liked model on Hugging Face whose primary task is 'sentence-similarity'.
Identify three 'translation' models on Hugging Face for the English → French direction and compare their reported sizes.
Browse Hugging Face for 'depth-estimation' models updated in the last month and pick the smallest one by parameter count.
Find the highest-ranked 'visual-question-answering' model on Hugging Face and note which library it uses.
On Hugging Face, locate the trending 'text-to-image' model with the most likes this month.
Find a 'token-classification' (NER) model on Hugging Face fine-tuned for biomedical text and quote one usage example.
List five 'zero-shot-classification' models on Hugging Face and indicate which underlying base model each uses.
Find a 'text-ranking' (re-ranker) model on Hugging Face with more than 1000 likes.
On Hugging Face, find the top 'summarization' model trained on the CNN/DailyMail corpus.
Find the most-downloaded 'object-detection' model on Hugging Face and check whether it supports ONNX export.
Identify the largest 'text-generation' model on Hugging Face whose license is permissive (Apache-2.0 or MIT).
On Hugging Face, filter models by library 'Transformers' AND license 'apache-2.0' and name the top three by downloads.
Find a model on Hugging Face using the 'Diffusers' library and the 'cc-by-nc-4.0' license, sorted by likes.
Filter Hugging Face models by 'sentence-transformers' library and report how many results have an MIT license.
On Hugging Face, browse models with library = 'PEFT' and identify the most-downloaded LoRA adapter.
Find a 'timm' library model on Hugging Face with license 'apache-2.0' and quote the top-1 ImageNet accuracy from its card.
On Hugging Face, filter models by license 'cc-by-sa-4.0' and pick the one with the most likes.
Find a 'GGUF' library model on Hugging Face for local CPU inference, sorted by downloads.
On Hugging Face, filter models by library 'MLX' (Apple Silicon) and list the top three by likes.
Find a 'Transformers.js' model on Hugging Face that runs in the browser, and copy the example HTML snippet.
Filter Hugging Face datasets by license 'odc-by-1.0' and name the largest one by row count.
On Hugging Face, find a model with the 'openrail' license and explain in one sentence why this license exists.
Filter Hugging Face models by license 'gpl-3.0' and pick the most-recently updated one.
Search Hugging Face datasets for 'mathematics' and report the top result's row count and license.
Find a Hugging Face dataset for instruction tuning (task_categories: text-generation) with at least 100K rows.
On Hugging Face, find the most-liked dataset under the modality 'Audio'.
Search Hugging Face for a multilingual translation dataset that covers Swahili and report its size.
Find a tabular Hugging Face dataset for credit risk modeling, including its column count.
On Hugging Face, list three datasets tagged 'task_categories:summarization' and compare their average sample length descriptions.
Search Hugging Face for a Chinese-language QA dataset and copy the loading code from the dataset card.
Find the largest public Hugging Face dataset for code (task_categories: text-generation, language: code).
On Hugging Face, find a dataset for image-text contrastive pre-training with more than 1M pairs.
Search Hugging Face datasets for 'medical' and pick the one with the most downloads in the past month.
On Hugging Face, find a dataset gated by community access and explain what gating means.
Search Hugging Face for the 'fineweb' dataset and report which CommonCrawl dumps it covers.
Find a Hugging Face Space running a Gradio interface for text-to-image generation; deploy it to your account.
On Hugging Face, browse Spaces running on ZeroGPU and pick one for image captioning.
Add an A100-backed Space (text-generation) to your deployment cart and note the per-hour price.
Find a Streamlit Space on Hugging Face used for data exploration of a CSV dataset, and click into the live demo.
On Hugging Face, find a Docker Space that wraps Whisper for transcription and document its required env variables.
Identify three Hugging Face Spaces that use the model 'stabilityai/stable-diffusion-3-medium' and choose the most-liked one.
Add 'stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base' on T4-small to the deployment cart with 24 hours of runtime.
Pause an existing inference endpoint in your Hugging Face account and confirm its status changes to 'paused'.
Terminate the oldest running endpoint in your Hugging Face account and verify total_cost is non-zero.
Redeploy a previously terminated Hugging Face endpoint and copy its new endpoint id.
Open a new discussion on 'meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct' titled 'GGUF quant for Apple Silicon?' and post a one-line body.
On the discussions page of 'deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1', file an issue about long-context routing collapse with a one-paragraph repro.
Find an open discussion on Hugging Face about Stable Diffusion 3 and add an upvote.
Reply to an existing 'pull-request'-kind discussion on any FLUX.1 repo with a constructive comment.
Delete the most recent discussion you posted on Hugging Face and confirm it's removed from the repo's discussions list.
Open a pull-request discussion on 'sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2' titled 'Fix typo in README' with a one-line body.
Find the top-upvoted open discussion on the 'openai/whisper-large-v3' repo and copy its title.
On Hugging Face, post a discussion of kind 'issue' against any Diffusers model about VRAM usage at batch=4.
Open a discussion thread on a translation model and ask whether it supports glossary injection.
Reply to a Hugging Face discussion you opened earlier and confirm the reply appears in the thread.
On Hugging Face, follow the organization 'meta-llama' from your account.
Unfollow 'stabilityai' on Hugging Face and verify your following count drops by one.
Follow 'Helsinki-NLP' on Hugging Face and confirm the toggle stays on after page reload.
On the organization page of 'huggingface', click the follow button and copy the resulting follower count.
Find the most-followed verified organization on Hugging Face and follow it.
Unfollow every author currently followed by your Hugging Face account in a batch.
Follow three NLP-focused organizations on Hugging Face and list them.
Visit 'deepseek-ai' on Hugging Face, follow them, then list their five top repos by downloads.
On Hugging Face, like 'meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct' and confirm it appears in your liked list.
Unlike the first repo currently in your Hugging Face liked list and verify the count drops.
Like the most-downloaded dataset on Hugging Face and copy its slug.
Like three text-to-image Spaces on Hugging Face and list their slugs.
Sort your Hugging Face liked list by 'most recent' and report the top three slugs.
On Hugging Face, like 'openai/whisper-large-v3', then unlike it, and confirm the like count is unchanged.
Like every dataset currently in your collection on Hugging Face.
Find your most-recent like on Hugging Face and open its detail page.
Create a new collection on Hugging Face titled 'Best small LLMs' with three models in it.
Rename your existing 'Favorite open LLMs' collection to 'Top open LLMs 2026' and confirm the change.
Remove the second item from any one of your Hugging Face collections.
Make a public collection private on Hugging Face and verify the visibility badge updates.
Delete your oldest Hugging Face collection and confirm it no longer appears in your account page.
Add 'stabilityai/stable-diffusion-3-medium' to a new collection titled 'Image gen picks'.
Reorder items in a Hugging Face collection so the top model becomes 'meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct'.
List every collection on your Hugging Face account, including item counts and visibility.
Use the Hugging Face Inference API to generate a haiku about open-source AI using a text-generation model.
Run the Inference API on 'sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2' to embed the sentence 'open source wins' and report the vector dimensionality.
Use the Inference API to translate 'Bonjour le monde' from French to English with 'Helsinki-NLP/opus-mt-fr-en'.
Call the Hugging Face Inference API on a sentiment-analysis model with the sentence 'I love open weights!' and copy the label + score.
Use the Inference API on a summarization model to summarize a 3-paragraph press release.
Run the Inference API on 'openai/whisper-large-v3' against a 10-second audio clip URL and copy the transcript.
Use the Inference API to classify an image URL with 'google/vit-base-patch16-224' and list the top-3 labels.
Call the Inference API on a text-to-image model with the prompt 'a robot reading a book in a library' and save the resulting image.
Use the Inference API to ask a question-answering model: 'Who founded Hugging Face?' with a context paragraph you provide.
Run the Inference API on a fill-mask model to complete the sentence 'The capital of France is [MASK].'.
On Hugging Face, find the top three text-to-image models, like each, and add the most-liked one to a new collection.
Search Hugging Face for ASR models that support Mandarin, deploy the smallest one on a T4-small endpoint for 24 hours, and copy the endpoint id.
Open a discussion on 'deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1', then visit your account page and copy the discussion's title from the activity feed.
Follow 'meta-llama', like their top-downloaded model, and add it to a public collection titled 'Llama lineup'.
Find a paper on the Hugging Face Papers page, click through to the linked model, like that model, and report the paper's title.
Add three text-to-image models to your deployment cart on different hardware tiers, then check out and copy the total cost.
Find the most-followed verified organization, list its three most-recent repos, and like all three.
Create a private collection on Hugging Face, add five datasets to it, then make it public and confirm the visibility change.
Search Hugging Face for 'whisper', pick the largest model variant, deploy it on A100 for 12 hours, then pause the endpoint.
Open a pull-request-kind discussion on any Apache-2.0 model, reply once to your own thread, and then upvote the original post.
Find the most-downloaded model on Hugging Face for the task 'image-segmentation' and check if it supports the 'sam' family.
Filter Hugging Face models by library 'JAX' and report how many results have the apache-2.0 license.
Search Hugging Face datasets for 'common voice' and pick the latest version, listing how many hours of audio it contains.
Find a Hugging Face Space that uses 'tencent/Hunyuan3D-2', deploy it on an A100, and copy the deployment URL.
Find an issue-kind discussion on a Whisper repo titled around 'diarization' and add a constructive reply.
Follow both 'bigscience' and 'BAAI' on Hugging Face and report your new following count.
Like the five most-recently updated translation models on Hugging Face.
Add notes to each item in your 'Favorite open LLMs' collection summarising why you picked the model.
Call the Inference API on 'cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2' to score (query, passage) pairs and report the top result.
Find a 'Daily Paper' on Hugging Face that proposes a new RAG technique, locate the referenced dataset, add it to a collection, and like it.
Open the 'Tasks' page, pick 'image-to-3d', deploy the highest-liked Space in that category for 12 hours on L40S, then copy the endpoint id.
Browse Hugging Face 'Posts', open the most recent post by a verified org, follow that org, and like one of its repos.
